title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/05/2022
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, an increase of 4.41% throughout the day. the quotation in themorning was increased by 20-30 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
